title: A Spectre That Must Be Banished

text_block_list.text: One day, as I was following along with Royce and Royce's self-promotion plans——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone, gather round～! 
This marks the end of "Ms. Royce's Special Racing Class"!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You all did such a good job! Your teacher's so impressed ♪ 
As for all the parents and guardians, be sure to give them lots of praise when you get home.

text_block_list.name: Parent
text_block_list.text:
Of course! 
I can't believe my little girl could be so fast… 
Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Scored some points with the family audience! 
I knew going with Honor Student Royce Mode was the right call ♪

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Next up is filming for the talk show. 
Plus, I should check the script for the dinner show on the way there.
She had a lot to do today, but I was sure she could handle it. She could achieve her dream——
choice_data_list: Getting closer to being the greatest!
Getting closer to being the greatest!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yes I am. 
And I'm not about to slow down!

text_block_list.name: TV Director
text_block_list.text:
——All righty then. Thanks for comin' to the show. 
Really tug on the viewers' heartstrings for me, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I have a suggestion about that—— 
Would you mind if I read a letter to my parents at the end of the show?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I poured all the gratitude I have into this letter. 
I would love the oppurtunity to read it for them.

text_block_list.name: TV Director
text_block_list.text:
Wew, that'll make for a real tearjerker of an ending! 
Two thumbs up on that idea! Dang, Trainer, your trainee sure is prepared! Thanks, she's a huge help!
choice_data_list: Oh, no, thank you for the opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Three more stops until we reach the assembly hall? 
I should check the script again while I have the chance——
(SCREEEEEEECH!!)

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text: "As abnormal noises have been detected, this train has come to an emergency stop. Please wait while we perform safety checks."

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royoce
text_block_list.text:
We're stopped!? 
But there's not much time until the event starts…!
choice_data_list: We should let them know we'll be late.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: …Trainer. Let's get off at the next stop.
choice_data_list: Did you come up with a plan?
Did you come up with a plan?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Of sorts. 
Time for your girl Royce-chan to show what she can do!

text_block_list.name: Dinner Show MC
text_block_list.text:
Er… Our guest Royce and Royce-san is running late and—— 
…Oh, it seems she's just now arrived!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Huff… Huff… Huff… Hello, everyone…! 
Huff… Huff… Sorry for… the wait!

text_block_list.name: Dinner Show MC
text_block_list.text:
A-Are you all right, Royce-san!? 
Um… What on earth happened?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Th-the train stopped, so… Huff… pant… 
I ran… all the way here… Teehee.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness… I made it in time… 
I'm so happy the show can go on——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Because I wanted to see you all so much…!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Royce-chan…! I wanted to see you tooooo! 
You're always doing so much for us… Thank you!!

With the hall now full of energy, I felt a wave of relief. 
We closed out the day with an incredible event——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: That was no good. Not at all.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
…Take a look at those two over there. 
They've been my fans for quite a while now.

text_block_list.name: Old Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Right? Royce was as cute as she always is～ 
…She was cute, but, well… 
Hmm…

text_block_list.name: Old Fan B
text_block_list.text: I- I get you! It's something like… I want to see a new side of Royce-chan! You know, something about her we've never seen before…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
You heard them. I'm getting stale. 
If I want to be the greatest, I'll need to diversify my portfolio.

Royce and Royce never takes half-measures. 
If I'm her trainer, then neither should I——
choice_data_list: I'll do everything I can to help.
I'll do everything I can to help.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Neither of us have time to rest. 
It's time to find me a new, charming angle!

What new angle would bring in the fans? 
We started thinking hard about the answer to that question.
